exercises.title: The naming dot
exercises.body: Shavian has no capital letters at all — so how do you spell a name? With a small dot right before the word: ·Sam, ·Ann, ·London. The dot is the only clue that a word is a proper name.

exercises.title: A new kind of exercise
exercises.body: Time to build whole sentences. You'll get an English sentence and a pool of Shavian words — tap them in the right order to translate it.
